rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0010
rows.name:
In the battle right before
the White Whale crashed,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0015
rows.name: I was cornered by multiple Ghosts[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0020
rows.name: and cut off.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0030
rows.name: Just at the moment I thought I was dead,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0040
rows.name: something opened up right in front of me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0050
rows.name:
At the same time, I felt an
incredibly raw gravity,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0060
rows.name: and my body, along with the Ares,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0065
rows.name: was sucked right into whatever had opened.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0070
rows.name: It was a place I'd never seen before.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0080
rows.name: If there's an edge to the universe,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0085
rows.name:
it was a place that made you
think that's what it was.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0090
rows.name: Thinking about it now,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0100
rows.name:
I might have been looking at the very
concept of parallel universes itself[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0110
rows.name: That place[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0120
rows.name:
Between the countless parallel
universes that exist[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0130
rows.name:
It was a place truly fitting to be
called the rift between worlds.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0140
rows.name:
You could say it was a world entirely
beyond human comprehension, but[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0150
rows.name:
surprisingly, almost all of the Ares's
functions were operating normally.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0160
rows.name:
The sensors, localized to Earth technology,
were completely useless, though[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0170
rows.name:
However, the main logger kept
receiving some kind of massive data.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0180
rows.name:
You'll probably laugh and
say I was dreaming, but[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0190
rows.name: I understood what that data was.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0200
rows.name: It wasn't logic, but intuition that did it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0210
rows.name: Flowing into the Ares[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0220
rows.name: and into me, was[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0230
rows.name:
the consciousness of every living
being across every universe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0240
rows.name: Instinctively,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0250
rows.name:
I shut off my mind from trying
to perceive them one by one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0260
rows.name:
It wasn't something a human
brain could process.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0270
rows.name: I sensed that in an instant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0280
rows.name:
It's something I picked up from an old
sci-fi movie, but it seems it wasn't wrong.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0290
rows.name: But,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0300
rows.name: unlike me, the Ares was exceptional.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0310
rows.name: From that massive torrent of data,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0320
rows.name:
it found and presented the
information I wanted most.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0330
rows.name: Yes[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0340
rows.name:
The method to return to
this world from that rift[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0350
rows.name: The Ares taught me that path.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0360
rows.name: Thanks to that, I was able to return.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0370
rows.name: No[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0380
rows.name:
The original universe where Earth existed was erased,
and this universe with Mira is a different world, so[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0390
rows.name: saying I "returned" might be strange.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0400
rows.name: Because of that experience,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0410
rows.name:
you thought the Ares could be used to
escape this universe with Mira as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0420
rows.name: Well, that's the gist of it, but[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0430
rows.name: Al...?[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0440
rows.name:
It's not like I returned
understanding everything myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0450
rows.name:
One mistake, and I could have been
swallowed by that torrent of consciousness[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0460
rows.name: and trapped there forever.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0470
rows.name: That world is[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0480
rows.name: A prison of consciousness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0490
rows.name: [ST:wide ]―A prison?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0510
rows.name: [ST:wide ]―Void.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0520
rows.name: Most likely, his consciousness too[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0525
rows.name: was trapped in that prison.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0530
rows.name:
Didn't you say the machine called Vita
was a vessel for Void to descend into?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0540
rows.name:
Perhaps it meant linking the
consciousness held within that prison.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0550
rows.name: Linking consciousness?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0560
rows.name: That sounds just like our [System:Ruby rt=Blue Bloods ]Ｂ．Ｂ．[/System:Ruby][ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0580
rows.name: Could it be[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0590
rows.name: It seems all the threads of cause and effect[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0600
rows.name: are beginning to connect.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0610
rows.name: It's highly probable that Void[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0620
rows.name:
escaped the prison by tracing the Ares's
escape from the rift between worlds.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0630
rows.name: At the exact same timing as I did.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0640
rows.name: And this time,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0645
rows.name:
he boarded that Vita not just as
a consciousness, but physically.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0650
rows.name:
If the Ares appeared in this
world shortly before we met[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0660
rows.name:
Then the occurrence of the disappearance
phenomena and the appearance of the Ghosts[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0670
rows.name:
could also be considered to
have been triggered by that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0680
rows.name: Hold on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0690
rows.name: Trying to connect every single thing together[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0695
rows.name: is jumping the gun a bit, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0700
rows.name: Yes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0710
rows.name: But...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0720
rows.name:
When Void attacked my
planet seeking the Ares[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0730
rows.name:
The Ghosts also appeared
at that exact timing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0750
rows.name: What was the term[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0760
rows.name: Causality?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0770
rows.name:
Void said he would bring the
world into concord, but[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0780
rows.name: I see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0790
rows.name:
I feel like I'm gradually
starting to see his motives.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0800
rows.name: It seems urgent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0810
rows.name: Yeah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0820
rows.name:
I need you to search for a Ma-non
engineer in Bōkyaku no Keikoku.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0830
rows.name: Understood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0840
rows.name: Give me the details of the situation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0850
rows.name:
That engineer was in charge of
constructing the jump drive, but[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0860
rows.name:
he said the core device for the
system was in a Growth fortress,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0870
rows.name: so I had him go retrieve it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0880
rows.name: That was quite a bold move.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0890
rows.name:
In our current situation,
beggars can't be choosers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0900
rows.name: Of course, I sent an escort, but[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0910
rows.name:
we lost contact after they were
spotted by the Growth forces.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0920
rows.name: I see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0930
rows.name: I understand the situation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0940
rows.name:
We'll head for Bōkyaku
no Keikoku immediately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0950
rows.name:
Sorry for the trouble,
but I'm counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32060100_MSG0960
rows.name: Let's move.[ST:wait ]
